title: Open Thread 428.5 + Zagreb Update
author: Scott Alexander
summary: Midweek open thread to announce: the Zagreb organizers have changed the meetup location. It’s now Importanne Galleria (Galleria Business Center), 1st Floor (Microblink), Trg Drage Iblera 10, Zagreb. Everything else, including the time (8PM Fri) stays the same.
full_text: Midweek open thread to announce: the Zagreb organizers have changed the meetup location. It’s now Importanne Galleria (Galleria Business Center), 1st Floor (Microblink), Trg Drage Iblera 10, Zagreb. Everything else, including the time (8PM Fri) stays the same.
